creator: 2khramtsov@gmail.com
text:

Disclaimer: offsets may be off due to local netinet6 patches.

I'm open to suggestions on how to get more useful info from ddb (NETDUMP+bhyve is too complicated for now, will setup way later).

base 2a58b312b62f seems to be a merge commit, so I'll see if I could bisect it locally (likely not, don't expect much).
